scripts.setup: npm install && npm --prefix frontend install && python3 -m venv .venv && .venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip && .venv/bin/python -m pip install -r requirements-local.txt
scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,orchestrator,ragvlm,video,sam3 -c blue,green,magenta,cyan,yellow "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "env PYTHONPATH=.:services/orchestrator .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload" "env PYTHONPATH=.:services/ragvlm-service .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8001 --reload" "env PYTHONPATH=.:services/video-service .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8002 --reload" "env PYTHONPATH=.:services/sam3-service .venv/bin/python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8003 --reload"
